matchDetails.proofAssistantDesc: Odds are dynamically calculated based on liquidity pools. Settlement triggers immediately when TxLINE API broadcasts a signed event containing match final state, fully verifiable via Merkle Proofs on Solana. No manual intervention possible.

history.title: Settlement History
history.subtitle: Full cryptographic log of past settlements.

accessibility.subtitle: Customize your ProofLens experience.
accessibility.uiScalingDesc: Adjust the global interface size. Elements will scale proportionally using root REM adjustments, ensuring layouts remain perfectly intact.

alerts.subtitle: You will be notified here when your markets settle.

settings.noWallet: No wallet connected. Use the header button to connect.

landing.subtitle: The first prediction market where every settlement is cryptographically verifiable. Say goodbye to opaque odds and hello to transparent, on-chain execution powered by TxLINE on Solana.

language.label: Language
language.detected: We noticed your preferred language is {language}. Would you like to switch?

glossary.merkleProof: A cryptographic proof that confirms match data has not been tampered with.
glossary.settlement: The process of resolving a prediction market and distributing payouts.
glossary.over25: You are predicting that there will be at least three goals in the match.
glossary.under25: You are predicting that there will be fewer than three goals in the match.
glossary.txline: A verifiable data pipeline that broadcasts signed events for settlement.
glossary.odds: The probability ratio that determines your potential payout.
glossary.liquidity: The total amount of funds available for trading in a market.
glossary.merkleRoot: A single hash representing the entire dataset, used for verification.
glossary.signature: A digital signature proving the authenticity of the data source.
glossary.txHash: A unique identifier for a transaction on the Solana blockchain.
glossary.validateStat: A function that validates match statistics against the on-chain proof.
glossary.winOver25: You won because at least three goals were scored in the match.
glossary.loseOver25: You lost because fewer than three goals were scored in the match.
glossary.winMatchWinner: You won because your predicted team won the match.
glossary.loseMatchWinner: You lost because your predicted team did not win the match.
glossary.winFirstGoal: You won because your predicted team scored the first goal.
glossary.loseFirstGoal: You lost because your predicted team did not score the first goal.
